productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Milan Yellow Tops
description: Style Note You know she loves wearing simple cotton tees. That's why palm tree styled this simple top with cutesy design details to make her look prettier than ever. A mini version of a pop princess indeed! Product Details Pink and white striped round neck top, has ruffled cap sleeves and print on the chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
